title: PersonLookup
description: Structured person/contact data matching Pipedrive CRM Kontakte conventions

website_url.description: Source website WITHOUT protocol — e.g. 'www.ablo.at' (not 'https://www.ablo.at', not 'ablo.at')

source_page.description: Page URL where this person was found — e.g. 'https://www.ablo.at/team'

salutation.description: Anrede — 'Herr' or 'Frau'. Infer from first name if not stated explicitly.

title_prefix.description: Titel vorgestellt — academic/professional title before the name, e.g. 'Mag.', 'Dr.', 'DI', 'Ing.'

title_suffix.description: Titel nachgestellt — academic title after the name, e.g. 'MBA', 'MSc', 'BSc', 'PhD'

first_name.description: First / given name — properly capitalized, e.g. 'Christian' (not 'christian')

last_name.description: Last / family name — properly capitalized, e.g. 'Rauch' (not 'rauch')

full_name.description: First + last name only, NO titles — properly capitalized, e.g. 'Christian Rauch' (not 'Mag. Christian Rauch', not 'christian rauch')

position.description: Position exactly as shown on business card, email signature, LinkedIn, or website — e.g. 'Geschäftsführer', 'Head of Sales', 'Prokurist'

role_category.description: Normalized role category — pick the closest match from the enum

is_decision_maker.description: true if this person is likely a decision maker (C-Level, VP, Director, Head of, Owner, Inhaber, Geschäftsführer, Prokurist, Vorstand, Aufsichtsrat, Board Member, Partner, Gesellschafter). false if clearly not. null if unclear.

additional_roles.description: Weitere Funktionen — additional roles outside the company, e.g. 'Vorstand Netzwerk XY', 'Beirat Verein Z'

email.description: Email — all lowercase, no capital letters — e.g. 'cr@ablo.at' (not 'Cr@ablo.at')

phone_mobile.description: Mobil — mobile/cell phone, +43 then digits, NO spaces, NO leading 0 — e.g. '+43664525488' (not '06644858', not '+43 664 824552')

phone_office.description: Büro — office/landline phone with Durchwahl appended, +43 then digits, NO spaces — e.g. '+4312345678'

linkedin_url.description: Personal LinkedIn profile without protocol — e.g. 'www.linkedin.com/in/christian-rauch'. Must be /in/ personal profile, NOT /company/.

label.description: Pipedrive person label — Ansprechpartner (permanent contact), Lead (general contact with potential), Fachabteilung (technical department contact), Marketing (receives marketing material), Wrong Contact, Lieferant, Händler
